folder_role: Test fixtures for lifecycle metadata scenarios including superseded, successor, archived, future, rolled back, and mixed version skill states.

public_entrypoints.name: lifecycleFixtures
public_entrypoints.purpose: Exports test fixture data for lifecycle metadata scenarios

integration_notes: This folder provides fixture data for testing lifecycle metadata handling in the system-skill-advisor codebase. The fixtures cover various lifecycle states including deprecated skills with redirect metadata, active successors, archived skills in z_archive, future skills in z_future, rolled back schema versions, and mixed schema version arrays. These fixtures are consumed by lifecycle-derived-metadata tests and scorer tests to verify routing logic for skills in different lifecycle states.
key_invariants: superseded fixtures include redirectTo metadata for routing redirects
archived fixtures reference z_archive directory paths
future fixtures reference z_future directory paths
rolled back fixtures use schema_version 1 format without derived block
mixed version fixtures contain arrays with varying schema_version values
